burden_audits.notes: The global uniqueness language was compared with the stated equality boundary.
The conclusion does not follow at the equality boundary.
The boundary calculation was checked against the stated payoff comparison.
Within the note's stated static domain, the theoretical comparison is an appropriate way to study uniqueness.
The complete prose was checked sentence by sentence for mechanics and stable wording.
The literature frontier was assessed but remains bounded by the recorded search scope and source access.
The scope anchor confirms that the complete source contains no figure.
